zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven於1495年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾阿沃代爾時，他的父親Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale25歲，母親Lady Margaret Kennedy23歲。他於1528年3月3日與Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland在蘇格蘭結婚。他去世於1551年10月10日在英國蘇格蘭享年56歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾阿沃代爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven于1495年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾阿沃代爾时，他的父亲Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale25岁，母亲Lady Margaret Kennedy23岁。他于1528年3月3日与Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland在苏格兰结婚。他去世于1551年10月10日在英国苏格兰享年56岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰藍納可爾阿沃代爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven was born in 1495, in Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, was 25 and his mother, Lady Margaret Kennedy, was 23. He married Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland on 3 March 1528, in Scotland. He died on 10 October 1551, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven est né en 1495, à Avondale, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Kennedy, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland le 3 mars 1528, à Écosse. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1551, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Avondale, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven 1495 in Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale 25 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Kennedy 23. Er hat am 3. März 1528 in Scotland Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland geheiratet. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1551 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Avondale, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven è nato il nel 1495 nel Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Kennedy, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland il 3 marzo 1528, nel Scotland. Morì il 10 ottobre 1551, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methvenが1495年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアアボンダルで生まれた時，父Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondaleは25歳，母Lady Margaret Kennedyは23歳であった。1528年3月3日にスコットランドでMargaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotlandと結婚した。彼は1551年10月10日にイギリススコットランドで56歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアアボンダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven(이)가 1495년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 아폰데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Kennedy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1528년 3월 3일 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1551년 10월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 아폰데일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven nasceu em 1495, em Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Kennedy, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland em 3 de março de 1528, em Scotland. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1551, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Avondale, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven родился в 1495 г. в местности авондеил, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Kennedy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland 3 марта 1528 г. в местности Шотландия. Он умер 10 октября 1551 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности авондеил, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Stewart 1st Lord Stewart of Methven nació en 1495, en Avondale, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Andrew Stewart 1st Lord Avondale, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Kennedy, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Tudor Queen Consort of Scotland el 3 de marzo de 1528, en Scotland. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1551, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Avondale, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
